source: Exercise 1: Match the words with the correct meanings
question: Match 'drought' with the correct meaning.
option_A: a very tall building in a city with many floors and offices
option_B: a dry period with no rain that affects plants and animals
option_C: a place where people can safely walk across a road
option_D: to travel around a place in order to discover new things
option_E: protecting animals, plants and the natural world
option_F: a bag used especially for carrying things on your back
option_G: something that is not harmful to the environment
option_H: a structure under the sea made by small animals
option_I: to process waste so it can be used again
option_J: a temporary shelter used when people go camping outdoors
answer_text: a dry period with no rain that affects plants and animals
